description: CompositionLight green checked skirt made of 100% cotton, with pleats, brown thread detailing, brown velvet tape on the hemline and brass button on the zipped closure on the front.FittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergentDo not bleachDry flat in shadeDo not iron directly on print or embroideryDry clean preferredIndulge your little girl in the spirit of spring in this light green pleated skirt from  ant. Team this with white tees and crocs footwear when you take her out the next time.The soft cotton fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while she enjoys those wondrous moments with you in style.
